## Summary

Describe the change and the research behavior it affects.

## Verification

- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `node --check public/landing.js`
- [ ] `node --check public/app.js`
- [ ] `pytest --cov=argmax --cov-report=term-missing`
- [ ] Visible changes checked at desktop and mobile widths

## Risk

Describe any effect on signal timing, portfolio accounting, metrics, public APIs, or deployment.
